name: Fudgey Valentine Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hershey's cocoa (or Hershey's European style cocoa)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch heart-shaped pans.
In a large bowl, beat butter and sugar on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; add to butter mixture alternately with sour cream, blending well. Beat for 3 minutes on medium speed.
Pour into prepared pans. Bake 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool 10 minutes; remove from pans to wire racks. Cool completely.
Prepare Pink Buttercream Frosting. Frost top of one layer; place second layer on top. Frost top and sides of entire cake. Garnish with maraschino cherries or chocolate curls, if desired.
Pink Buttercream Frosting:
In a small bowl, beat butter until light and fluffy. Gradually add powdered sugar alternately with milk and vanilla until smooth and of the desired consistency; stir in food coloring.
